name: versions
_note: Live boot reality: the reachable personas.versions is the Z4 roadmap stub — it ignores its input and returns a single { ok:true, versions:[{id:'v1',current:true}], reason:'single_version_only' } so the PersonaDetailPanel renders a one-version history without crashing. The full version-history macro (snapshots prior versions on every revise) lives in the currently-unwired server/domains/personas.js; once wired, versions becomes author/visibility-gated and returns result.versions with a real changelog per revision.
